images.prompt: A vast crystal cave interior, symmetric centered composition: a perfectly still glowing blue pool in the center, luminous translucent stalactites hanging above it dripping water, soft cyan light radiating from beneath the pool surface, fine glowing particles drifting in the air, dark smooth rock walls with no distractions, volumetric light shafts, magical serene atmosphere, photoreal fantasy render.
